interfaces.name: getHomepageContent
interfaces.description: Get homepage content including primary actions, featured programs, upcoming events, and testimonials.

interfaces.name: getProgramFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get filter and sort options for the Programs & Finder page.

interfaces.name: searchPrograms
interfaces.description: Search childcare programs with filters for age group, schedule, campus, ZIP radius, tuition range, and sort options.

parameters.name: ageGroupCode
parameters.description: Age group to filter, e.g., 'toddlers_2_3', 'preschool_3_5'. Use 'all' or omit for no filter.

parameters.name: postalCode
parameters.description: ZIP/postal code for distance-based search, e.g., '94105'.

distance_miles.description: Distance from searched postal code if provided.

interfaces.name: getProgramDetails
interfaces.description: Get full details for a specific childcare program for the Program Detail page.

interfaces.name: startEnrollmentApplication
interfaces.description: Start an enrollment application for a specific program from the Program Detail or Comparison page.

parameters.name: desiredStartDate
parameters.description: Desired program start date in ISO format 'YYYY-MM-DD'.

interfaces.name: createWaitlistEntry
interfaces.description: Join the waitlist for a specific program with child and desired start information.

parameters.name: programId
parameters.description: Program.id for which to join the waitlist.

interfaces.name: createProgramComparison
interfaces.description: Create a program comparison view for selected programs, returning side-by-side comparison data.

parameters.name: programIds
parameters.description: Array of Program.id values selected for comparison.

cheapest_program_id.description: Program.id with the lowest annual tuition among compared programs.

interfaces.name: getTourFormOptions
interfaces.description: Get options for the Schedule a Tour form: campuses, visit types, and common time-of-day presets.

interfaces.name: getAvailableTourSlots
interfaces.description: Get available tour slots for a campus and visit type over a date range, used to populate the date and time pickers.

parameters.name: campusId
parameters.description: Campus.id where the tour will take place.

start.description: Slot start datetime in ISO format.

end.description: Slot end datetime in ISO format.

interfaces.name: submitTourRequest
interfaces.description: Submit a request to schedule a tour with visit details and parent contact information.

parameters.name: campusId
parameters.description: Campus.id selected in the tour form.

parameters.name: visitStart
parameters.description: Visit start datetime in ISO format.

parameters.name: visitEnd
parameters.description: Visit end datetime in ISO format.

interfaces.name: getTuitionOverview
interfaces.description: Get high-level tuition and schedule information for the Tuition & Schedules page.

interfaces.name: getTuitionCalculatorOptions
interfaces.description: Get configuration options for the Tuition Calculator, including age groups, days of the week, and time options.

interfaces.name: getTuitionEstimate
interfaces.description: Calculate an estimated monthly tuition based on age group, selected days, times, and optional budget.

parameters.name: maxMonthlyBudget
parameters.description: Optional budget threshold to determine if estimate is within budget.

budget_difference.description: Positive value indicates amount over budget; negative indicates under budget.

interfaces.name: saveTuitionQuote
interfaces.description: Save the most recently calculated tuition estimate as a named quote with contact email.

interfaces.name: getTeacherFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get filter and sort options for the Our Teachers page.

interfaces.name: searchTeachers
interfaces.description: Search teacher profiles with filters for role, age group, experience, ratings, and sort options.

interfaces.name: getTeacherDetails
interfaces.description: Get detailed information for a single teacher profile page.

interfaces.name: addTeacherFavorite
interfaces.description: Mark a teacher as a favorite/preferred teacher, optionally with a custom label.

parameters.name: label
parameters.description: Optional user-facing label, e.g., 'Preferred toddler teacher'.

interfaces.name: getTeacherFavorites
interfaces.description: Get the list of favorite/preferred teachers saved for the current user.

interfaces.name: getEventFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get filter options for the Events & Calendar page.

interfaces.name: getEvents
interfaces.description: Get events for a specific month with optional filters for type, price, day-of-week, and time-of-day.

interfaces.name: getEventDetails
interfaces.description: Get details for a specific event for the event detail/RSVP page.

interfaces.name: submitEventRSVP
interfaces.description: Submit an RSVP for an event with attendee count and optional contact information.

interfaces.name: getFAQSearchOptions
interfaces.description: Get FAQ and parent resource search options such as topics and popular queries.

interfaces.name: searchArticles
interfaces.description: Search FAQs and parent resource articles by query and optional topic filters.

parameters.name: isFaq
parameters.description: If true, restrict to FAQ articles.

interfaces.name: getArticleDetails
interfaces.description: Get full details for a specific article or FAQ, including related articles and the recommended contact subject.

parameters.name: articleId
parameters.description: Article.id to load. Provide this or slug.

parameters.name: slug
parameters.description: Article.slug to load. Provide this or articleId.

default_contact_subject.description: Suggested ContactMessage.subject enum, e.g., 'curriculum_potty_training', based on article topics.

interfaces.name: getContactFormOptions
interfaces.description: Get contact form subjects and defaults, optionally based on the originating article.

parameters.name: articleId
parameters.description: Optional Article.id if contact form is opened from an article.

default_subject.description: Subject value that should be preselected.

interfaces.name: submitContactMessage
interfaces.description: Submit a contact form message with subject, message text, and contact details.

parameters.name: articleId
parameters.description: Optional Article.id if the question relates to a specific article.

interfaces.name: getNewsletterSignupOptions
interfaces.description: Get options for the email newsletter signup form: topics, campuses, and age ranges.

interfaces.name: subscribeToNewsletter
interfaces.description: Submit an email newsletter subscription with topic, campus, and child age preferences.

interfaces.name: getAboutUsContent
interfaces.description: Get About Us page content including mission, values, philosophy, history, leadership, and campus overview.

interfaces.name: getCampusList
interfaces.description: Get a list of all campuses with addresses, contact info, and supported age groups.

interfaces.name: getCampusDetails
interfaces.description: Get details for a specific campus including address, map, contact info, and program availability summary.

interfaces.name: getPoliciesContent
interfaces.description: Get Policies & Handbook page content summarizing key policies.

interfaces.name: getHandbookDocuments
interfaces.description: Get downloadable parent handbook documents and related resources.

download_url.description: URL for downloading the handbook document.

interfaces.name: getPrivacyPolicyContent
interfaces.description: Get Privacy Policy content describing data collection, use, retention, and security.

helperFunctions.name: _resolvePostalCodeToCoordinates
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to resolve a postal code to latitude and longitude for distance-based program searches.

helperFunctions.name: _calculateDistanceMiles
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to calculate distance in miles between two coordinate pairs.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrUpdateTuitionCalculatorState
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to store and retrieve the most recent tuition calculator configuration and estimate for the current user.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateTeacherFavoritesStore
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to manage the local storage of TeacherFavorite records for the single user.

helperFunctions.name: _normalizeEventDateRangeForMonth
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to expand a 'YYYY-MM' month string into a concrete start and end date range for event queries.
